prompts.prompt: A moonlit witch in a broad pointed hat, three-quarter portrait, strong silhouette on a dark indigo background
A whimsical retro airship with a large oval balloon and a small gondola, viewed from the side in a clear blue sky
A quiet forest clearing with prominent pine trees, distant hills, a pale sun, and a winding stream
A compact medieval hill castle with two towers, crenellated walls, a central gate, and a stone bridge at dusk
A winged dragon in a sweeping flying pose, breathing one bold arc of flame above a mountain ridge
